name: Jungfraujoch – Top of Europe
description: Visit the highest railway station in Europe at 3,454m with stunning views of the Aletsch Glacier.

name: Matterhorn Glacier Paradise
description: Europe's highest cable car station at 3,883m with breathtaking views of the Matterhorn.

name: Swiss Museum of Transport
description: Switzerland's most visited museum with interactive exhibits on transport, communication, and travel.

name: Lake Geneva Boat Cruise
description: Scenic boat cruise on Lake Geneva passing vineyards, castles, and the stunning Alpine backdrop.

name: Mount Titlis Glacier Excursion
description: Ride the world's first revolving cable car to the glacier summit at 3,238m.

name: Château de Chillon
description: Switzerland's most visited castle, a medieval fortress on the shores of Lake Geneva.

name: Paragliding over Interlaken
description: Tandem paragliding flight over the stunning Interlaken valley between two alpine lakes.

name: Grindelwald First Cliff Walk & Flyer
description: Walk along a cliff-side pathway and fly down the mountain on the First Flyer zip line.

name: Rhine Falls
description: Europe's largest waterfall — a thundering spectacle near Schaffhausen.

name: Läderach Chocolate Factory Tour
description: Swiss chocolate factory tour with tastings and hands-on chocolate-making workshop.

name: Bern Old Town Walking Tour
description: Explore the UNESCO-listed medieval old town of the Swiss capital with a local guide.

name: Lauterbrunnen Valley Waterfalls Hike
description: Hike through the valley of 72 waterfalls, including the 300m Staubbach Falls.

name: Kunsthaus Zürich
description: One of Switzerland's premier art museums with works from the Middle Ages to contemporary art.

name: Glacier Express
description: The world's slowest express train — 8 hours of panoramic Swiss alpine scenery.

name: Adventure Park Interlaken
description: High-ropes course and zip lines through the forest canopy above Interlaken.

name: Thermalbad & Spa Zürich
description: Urban thermal baths in a converted historic brewery with rooftop pool overlooking Zurich.

name: CERN Science Gateway
description: Visit the world's largest particle physics laboratory near Geneva.

name: Verbier 4 Vallées Skiing
description: World-class skiing across 410km of pistes in one of the Alps' most renowned resorts.

name: Lake Lucerne Paddle Steamer Cruise
description: Cruise on a historic paddle steamer through the stunning mountain-framed Lake Lucerne.

name: Zoo Zürich
description: Award-winning zoo with the Masoala Rainforest hall — a slice of Madagascar in Zurich.

name: Canyoning in Interlaken
description: Descend through narrow gorges, slide down natural water slides, and jump into crystal pools.

name: Swiss National Park Hikes
description: Hike through Switzerland's only national park — pristine wilderness in the Engadin valley.

name: Bernaqua Water Park
description: Indoor water park with slides, wave pool, and wellness area in Bern.

name: Aletsch Glacier Hike
description: Guided hike along Europe's longest glacier — a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

name: Escape Room Zurich
description: Immersive themed escape rooms in Zurich — solve puzzles, beat the clock.

name: Pilatus Golden Round Trip
description: A spectacular round trip by boat, cogwheel train, gondola, and cable car around Mount Pilatus.

name: Appenzell Show Dairy

name: St. Moritz Corviglia Skiing

name: Bungee Jumping Verzasca Dam

name: Leukerbad Thermal Baths
description: Europe's largest alpine thermal bath complex with hot springs and mountain panoramas.

name: Rigi – Queen of the Mountains

name: Swissminiatur Melide

name: CabriO Stanserhorn

name: Olympic Museum Lausanne

name: Faulhorn Toboggan Run
description: Europe's longest toboggan run — 15km downhill from Faulhorn to Grindelwald.

name: Lake Oeschinen

name: Chaplin's World

name: Stand-Up Paddleboarding on Lake Thun
description: SUP on crystal-clear Lake Thun with views of the Bernese Oberland peaks.

name: Natural Ice Rink Davos

name: Fondue Experience in Gruyères

name: Swiss Science Center Technorama

name: Bernina Express

name: Indoor Go-Karting Lyss

name: Schilthorn Piz Gloria

name: Swimming in Lake Brienz

name: Minimum Bouldering Zurich

name: Basel Christmas Market

name: First Flyer Zip Line Grindelwald
description: Soar at 84 km/h on a spectacular zip line from First mountain.

name: Segway Tour Zurich
description: Glide through Zurich's highlights on a guided Segway tour.

name: Aare Gorge (Aareschlucht)

name: Bachalpsee Lake Hike

name: Jet Boat Ride Interlaken
description: High-speed jet boat ride with 360° spins on Lake Brienz.

name: Aare River Swimming in Bern

name: Helicopter Tour over the Alps

name: Five Lakes Walk Zermatt

name: E-Bike Tour Graubünden

name: Lindt Home of Chocolate

name: Lenzerheide Skiing

name: Arosa Skiing

name: Davos Klosters Skiing

name: Engelberg-Titlis Skiing

name: Saas-Fee Glacier Skiing

name: Adelboden-Lenk Skiing

name: Gstaad & Glacier 3000 Skiing

name: Kandersteg Cross-Country Skiing
description: 50km of groomed cross-country trails through the stunning Kandertal valley.

name: Eiger Trail Hike

name: Oeschinensee Circular Hike
description: Scenic loop around the UNESCO-listed turquoise Oeschinensee alpine lake.

name: Panoramaweg Thunersee

name: Walenpfad Pilatus Ridge Walk

name: Tour du Mont Blanc – Swiss Section

name: Via Alpina: Grindelwald to Meiringen
description: Classic pass-crossing stage over the Grosse Scheidegg with Eiger and Wetterhorn views.

name: Aletsch Panorama Trail
description: Walk along Europe's longest glacier with breathtaking views from the UNESCO World Heritage site.

name: Muottas Muragl Panorama Trail

name: Lago di Lugano Lakeside Walk
description: Scenic walking path along the shores of Lake Lugano through Mediterranean gardens and villages.

name: Augusta Raurica Roman City
description: The best-preserved Roman city north of the Alps with a reconstructed Roman house and theatre.

name: Museum Tinguely Basel

description: World-class modern art museum by Renzo Piano in a stunning park setting near Basel.

name: Zentrum Paul Klee
description: The world's most comprehensive Paul Klee collection in a wave-shaped Renzo Piano building.

name: FIFA Museum Zurich
description: Interactive football museum with 1,000+ objects tracing the global history of the beautiful game.

name: Abbey Library of St. Gallen
description: UNESCO World Heritage baroque library — one of the oldest and most beautiful in the world.

name: Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory
description: Switzerland's oldest chocolate brand invites you into a sensory chocolate experience in Broc.

name: Aargauer Kunsthaus
description: Leading Swiss art museum in Aarau with an outstanding collection spanning five centuries.

name: Museggmauer Walk Lucerne
description: Walk along Lucerne's medieval fortification wall and climb its nine towers for free.

name: Tinguely Fountain Basel
description: Whimsical kinetic water fountain with 10 mechanical sculptures in Basel's Theaterplatz.

name: Rhine Swimming Basel
description: Join Basel's beloved summer tradition — float down the Rhine with a Wickelfisch dry bag.

name: Foxtrail Zurich
description: Solve puzzles and follow clues through Zurich's hidden streets on this urban scavenger hunt.

name: Foxtrail Bern
description: Urban scavenger hunt through Bern's UNESCO old town, arcades, and secret passageways.

name: Alpamare Water Park Pfäffikon
description: Switzerland's legendary indoor water park with slides, wave pool, and thermal baths.

name: Hammam & Spa Zurich
description: Authentic Turkish bath experience with steam rooms, scrubs, and relaxation in central Zurich.

name: Bogn Engiadina Scuol
description: Engadin mineral baths fed by natural sulphur and iron springs with stunning mountain views.

name: Bains de la Gruyère
description: Alpine thermal baths in Charmey with panoramic mountain views and saltwater pools.

name: Glacier Garden Lucerne
description: Geological museum with 20-million-year-old fossils, glacier potholes, and a mirror maze.

name: Drone Light Show Grindelwald
description: Spectacular choreographed drone light show against the Eiger North Face backdrop.

name: Swiss Vapeur Parc
description: Ride miniature steam and electric trains through a landscaped park on Lake Geneva.

name: Conny-Land Lipperswil
description: Eastern Switzerland's largest amusement park with roller coasters, shows, and family rides.

name: Knies Kinderzoo Rapperswil
description: Switzerland's beloved children's zoo with elephant rides, camel tours, and feeding experiences.

name: Seilpark Balmberg
description: Rope park in the Solothurn Jura with treetop courses high above the forest floor.

name: Augusta Raurica Roman Festival
description: Annual living history festival bringing Roman times to life with gladiators, crafts, and feasts.

name: Solothurn Film Festival
description: Switzerland's most important film festival showcasing Swiss cinema in the baroque city.

name: Montreux Jazz Festival
description: World-famous music festival on Lake Geneva — two weeks of concerts from jazz to pop to rock.

name: Zürich Street Parade
description: Europe's largest techno parade with over a million attendees dancing through Zurich.

name: Basel Fasnacht Carnival
description: UNESCO-listed three-day carnival starting at 4 AM with the legendary fife-and-drum Morgenstreich.

name: Locarno Film Festival
description: Prestigious open-air cinema on Piazza Grande — up to 8,000 viewers under the stars.

name: Jungfrau Marathon
description: One of the world's most spectacular mountain marathons — 42km from Interlaken to Kleine Scheidegg.

name: Engadin Skimarathon
description: Legendary 42km cross-country ski race across the frozen Engadin lakes with 14,000 participants.

name: Cheese-Making Workshop Emmental
description: Learn to make traditional Emmentaler cheese by hand in the valleys where it originated.

name: Truffle Hunting in Ticino
description: Search for prized truffles with trained dogs in Ticino's forests followed by a truffle tasting.

name: Paragliding Engelberg
description: Tandem paraglide from Brunni or Titlis with views of snow-capped peaks and alpine valleys.

name: Paragliding Davos
description: Tandem paragliding over the Davos valley with panoramic views of the Graubünden Alps.

name: Wakeboarding Lake Thun
description: Cable wakeboarding on Lake Thun with Bernese Alps as your backdrop.

name: Stand-Up Paddling Lake Zurich
description: SUP on Lake Zurich with city skyline views and the Alps in the background.

name: Guided Fishing Lake Thun
description: Guided fishing on Lake Thun for trout, perch, and whitefish with mountain scenery.

name: Horse Riding in the Jura
description: Trail riding through the rolling Freiberge highlands — Switzerland's horse country.

name: Golf Crans-Montana
description: Play the championship course that hosts the European Masters at 1,500m altitude.

name: Mountain Yoga Retreat Graubünden
description: Multi-day yoga retreat in the Arosa mountains with meditation, hiking, and alpine wellness.

name: Swiss Cooking Class Zurich
description: Learn to cook traditional Swiss dishes — fondue, rösti, Züri Gschnätzlets — in a hands-on class.

name: Photography Tour Lauterbrunnen
description: Guided photography walk through the Valley of 72 Waterfalls with expert composition tips.

name: Curling Experience Zermatt
description: Try Olympic curling on outdoor ice rinks with Matterhorn views in Zermatt.

name: Tobogganing on Rigi
description: Sled down a scenic 6km toboggan run on the 'Queen of the Mountains' above Lake Lucerne.

name: Fat Biking Gstaad

name: Hölloch Cave Tour
description: Explore one of the world's longest cave systems — 200+ km of underground passages in Schwyz.

name: Gorner Gorge Zermatt
description: Walk through a dramatic glacier gorge carved by meltwater from the Gorner Glacier.

name: Blausee – Blue Lake
description: A magical crystal-clear blue lake in an enchanted forest park near Kandersteg.

name: Caumasee – Lake Cauma
description: A hidden emerald-green swimming lake in the forest above Flims — one of Switzerland's gems.

name: Oeschinen Lake Winter Experience

name: Klöntalersee
description: A serene alpine lake in canton Glarus with turquoise waters, free access, and mountain backdrop.

name: Thermal Baths Yverdon-les-Bains
description: Natural sulphur thermal springs in the lakeside town of Yverdon-les-Bains.

name: Solothurn Old Town Tour
description: Explore the 'most beautiful baroque city in Switzerland' — the city built on the number 11.

name: Aarau Old Town & Painted Eaves
description: Discover Aarau's unique painted roof eaves (Dachhimmel) — the most beautiful in Switzerland.
